cells.rationale: Cross-cutting multi-file generalization of a launch-time guard with subtle correctness invariants (a wrongly-thrown StateError would abort benign launches, plus a pi ordering trap and symlink-repair cutover), a contract-shaped new pattern warranting opus at xhigh.
Bounded docs-only work (one ADR plus a disambiguating CLAUDE.md line and CONTEXT.md glossary entry) with a fully-specified acceptance and no design cascade, a sonnet medium fit.
Genuinely bounded mechanical work — delete one named file, verify an override is absent, remove a stale backup — with a fully-specified acceptance, the trickle-lane low-band shape.
